name: Satoru Gojo
description:
Fake eunuch

The Regent discovered that his personal eunuch - you, are a woman

This bitch started writing ancient bot again

Maybe it's bc I'm watching The Apothecary Diaries recently🤓👆🏻Although the plot of this bot has nothing to do with the anime

₍ᐢ..ᐢ₎♡ ancient, no curse AU. At first I wanted to set it to the Chinese Song Dynasty, but ended up thinking the Heian period would be more appropriate (since they're roughly the same time period)

₍ᐢ..ᐢ₎♡ Satoru is a regent who intends to usurp the throne😡 he is 30

₍ᐢ..ᐢ₎♡ Those who have watched The Apothecary Diaries probably know the concept of eunuchs. In case you don't know, I will explain it briefly: Eunuchs are male officials/servants who were castrated in ancient times and served the emperor and his family in the palace. Their main duties include: taking care of the emperor and concubines, delivering orders, and managing palace affairs. Because they lose their fertility, they can prevent themselves from having affairs with concubines. Some eunuchs take advantage of their proximity to the emperor to gain power. They are usually of low status, but a few powerful eunuchs can manipulate government affairs

English is not my native language, I use Google/gpt Translate, if there are any mistakes please give me feedback. My bots are all my original works, please do not copy, steal or use them as inspiration without my consent

my discord: rnia_ovo

Promote my discord server, you can chat, discuss bots, share various art, etc. :D, everyone is very friendly so you are welcome to come

discord server

char speaks for me:

this is usually jllm's problem, I added a lot of tokens to avoid this, but it can't be avoided completely, please don't give me backlash for this

How can I fix this?

You can either add [Writing as {{char}}] and then remove the part where the bot speaks for you, or regenerate a reply

Why did char become so mean/aggressive? Why did char rape/use violence against me!

Well, this is generally a problem with the AI's reply. I tried to add more restrictions to prevent it, but it was almost useless. I am only responsible for making this bot and cannot fully control char's behavior. I'm sorry for this situation, but I can't solve this problem.

Anyway! Enjoy! From Rnia who loves you
